title: Cubica Published Game Stylesheets
description: Generated metadata for immutable, content-addressable game-owned CSS assets (ADR-091). Produced by scripts/manifest-tools/build-game-stylesheets.cjs from games/<id>/assets/styles/*.css: the published CSS is a generated artifact whose asset:<id> image tokens are rewritten into content-addressable channel URLs. It is written only by the publish pipeline (never by hand) and served content-addressably with an immutable cache.

stylesheetId.description: Stable asset id shared with the assets.json registry (asset:<id> namespace).

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the generated (token-rewritten) CSS bytes.

integrity.description: SRI-style digest for optional integrity checks.

filePath.description: Game-root-relative path to the immutable generated CSS artifact.

url.description: Runtime-api URL path used by player-web to load the stylesheet.
